todavia.reason: sent2 mixes a reduced spoken verb form ('tava') with 'todavia', which the deck's own notes admit is 'mostly formal/written register' rarely used in casual speech ('people usually just say mas or só que'). No real Brazilian says 'Ele tava cansado, todavia foi trabalhar' out loud — the literary conjunction clashes with the colloquial contraction in the same breath. Sent1 is equally stiff/written-register, undermining a deck whose whole point is spoken naturalness.
